nodes.title: Get Journal Entries
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/journal-entries. Returns array of journal entries for business ordered by date. Requires Authorization and bizId. Returns 200 with [{id, description, entryDate, lines, ...}].

nodes.title: Post Journal Entry
nodes.description: POST /api/businesses/:bizId/journal-entries with body {description, entryDate, lines: [{accountId, debit, credit}]}. Validates lines balance (sum debit = sum credit). Creates journal_entry and journal_entry_lines. Returns 201 with created entry. Returns 400 if lines do not balance.
